response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications including C programming for UNIX embedded systems, Linux kernel modification experience, native-level Japanese proficiency, and any demonstrated background in embedded networking, security protocols (e.g., MACsec, 802.1X), or switch firmware development — all essential for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience with diverse languages and systems
Demonstrated open-source contributions and tooling expertise
Proven ability to work across hardware-software boundaries in embedded contexts
concerns: No evidence of C programming in UNIX embedded environments
No Japanese language proficiency — a hard requirement
No experience with LAN-switch security features or embedded networking protocols

key_factors.factor: No embedded C or Linux kernel experience
Absence of network security domain knowledge
